#  View Change Orders (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Commitments tool.
  * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Commitment Change Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/materials-user-guide-with-financials/create-a-change-order-cco)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the commitment to view.
  3. Tap **Change Orders**.  
_Note:_ This action reveals a list of change orders associated with the selected commitment.
  4. Tap a change order to view its details.


## See Also
  * [View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/view-purchase-orders-and-subcontracts-ios)
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
  * [Which Procore tools can I use to create a change event?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-can-i-use-to-create-a-change-event)
title: View Change Orders (iOS)
description: How to view change orders for a commitment using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
